title: SVG Cheat Sheet
description: Quick reference for SVG syntax and usage patterns

commands.command:
<linearGradient id="grad1" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="100%" y2="0%">
  <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:blue;stop-opacity:1" />
  <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:green;stop-opacity:1" />
</linearGradient>
commands.description: Create a linear gradient from blue to green
commands.scenario: Create a linear gradient from blue to green

commands.command:
<radialGradient id="grad2" cx="50%" cy="50%" r="50%">
  <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:red;stop-opacity:1" />
  <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:yellow;stop-opacity:1" />
</radialGradient>
commands.description: Create a radial gradient from red to yellow
commands.scenario: Create a radial gradient from red to yellow

commands.description: Apply a gradient to a rectangle
commands.scenario: Apply a gradient to a rectangle

commands.command: <text x="10" y="20" font-family="Verdana" font-size="20" fill="blue">Styled Text</text>
commands.description: Apply a font size and family to text
commands.scenario: Apply a font size and family to text

commands.command: <path d="M10 10 H 90 V 90 H 10 L 10 10" fill="transparent" stroke="black" />
commands.description: Draw a simple path using move and line commands
